sourcesContent:
export const RESOURCES_DATA = [
  { id:1,  name:"Big-O Cheat Sheet",         ext:"PDF",      size:"1.2 MB", upvotes:67, group:"Algorithms & DS",   by:"Alex K.",   ago:"2d", voted:false },
  { id:2,  name:"Reaction Mechanism Guide",  ext:"PDF",      size:"3.4 MB", upvotes:44, group:"Organic Chemistry", by:"Priya M.",  ago:"5d", voted:false },
  { id:3,  name:"Eigenvalue Tutorial",       ext:"PDF",      size:"820 KB", upvotes:52, group:"Linear Algebra",    by:"Jordan L.", ago:"1w", voted:false },
  { id:4,  name:"PyTorch Quickstart",        ext:"NOTEBOOK", size:"5.1 MB", upvotes:89, group:"Machine Learning",  by:"Sam T.",    ago:"3d", voted:false },
  { id:5,  name:"Renaissance Timeline",      ext:"DOC",      size:"450 KB", upvotes:28, group:"History of Art",    by:"Maria G.",  ago:"1w", voted:false },
  { id:6,  name:"Entropy & Enthalpy Notes",  ext:"MD",       size:"120 KB", upvotes:41, group:"Thermodynamics",    by:"Chen W.",   ago:"4d", voted:false },
  { id:7,  name:"Game Theory Problems",      ext:"PDF",      size:"2.3 MB", upvotes:33, group:"Microeconomics",    by:"Aisha R.",  ago:"6d", voted:false },
  { id:8,  name:"Sorting Animations",        ext:"VIDEO",    size:"22 MB",  upvotes:55, group:"Algorithms & DS",   by:"Nav P.",    ago:"1d", voted:false },
  { id:9,  name:"Schrödinger Walkthrough",   ext:"PDF",      size:"1.8 MB", upvotes:71, group:"Quantum Physics",   by:"Leo M.",    ago:"2d", voted:false },
  { id:10, name:"Gradient Descent Notebook", ext:"NOTEBOOK", size:"3.2 MB", upvotes:80, group:"Machine Learning",  by:"Sam T.",    ago:"3d", voted:false },
];
export const EXT_COLORS = { PDF:"#f87171", NOTEBOOK:"#38bdf8", DOC:"#60a5fa", MD:"#2dd4bf", VIDEO:"#f472b6", IMAGE:"#a78bfa" };
export const EXT_EMOJIS = { PDF:"📄", NOTEBOOK:"📓", DOC:"📝", MD:"📋", VIDEO:"🎬", IMAGE:"🖼️" };
